design_quality.assessment: Custom colors present, fluid typography, good spacing rhythm. Critical gaps: no semantic color badges on rows, no left-border accents, no illustrated empty states. Dark mode works but lacks polish.

originality.assessment: Generic dashboard feel. Missing horizontal filter bar (zero filter elements), no filter chips, no row entrance animations, no illustrated states. No signature interactions. Reads like a baseline admin table, not a designed product.

craft.assessment: Good: Focus states visible, smooth timing functions (cubic-bezier), respects prefers-reduced-motion, minimal layout shifts. Gaps: Only 4 transition elements (expect 20+), no explicit spring physics, density toggle not fully verified. Solid foundation but needs more polish.

functionality.assessment: CRITICAL BLOCKER: Table does not render (0 rows detected). Cannot evaluate row selection, filters, density toggle, column controls. Appears to be client-side data loading issue or component not mounting. Must debug data flow before next iteration.

summary_assessment: Iteration 1 falls 2.08 points below pass threshold (6.42 vs 8.5). Competent CSS styling and basic craft, but missing critical design-driven features: horizontal filter bar, semantic color badges, staggered row animations, illustrated states. Most severe issue: table data not rendering in headless evaluation. Immediate actions: (1) Debug table data load, (2) implement semantic color tokens, (3) build filter bar UI, (4) add row entrance animations. Timeline: 6-12 hours to reach 8.5+.
critical_gaps: No semantic color badges on rows
No staggered row entrance animation (spec signature moment)
Filter pill spring animation not implemented
recommended_fixes_p0: Render table with data (debug client-side fetch/React)
Add semantic color badges to table cells (status colors)
Build horizontal filter chip bar below PageHeader
